modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access files on USB drive; needs recovery help.

full_description_text: User downloaded files before but now cannot find them. The flash drive blinks but does not show on the computer. Also, there is a pop-up saying the drive needs formatting. IT needs to help recover these files from the USB drive.
short_description: Unable to access files on USB drive; needs recovery help.
description: User downloaded files before but now cannot find them. The flash drive blinks but does not show on the computer. Also, there is a pop-up saying the drive needs formatting. IT needs to help recover these files from the USB drive.
